picks.narrative: A multi-factor convergence edge: Foster Griffin (4.08 xFIP) vs. Michael King (3.67), with defense (oaa), home field adding to the baseline. No single signal dominates — the probability gap of 7.8pp reflects several independent inputs each pushing in the same direction. The model's fair price is -119 vs. the +114 available.
